images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with the aesthetic of a top-tier gravure idol, embodying a relaxed weekend vibe at a cliff edge. She is dressed in a provocative, form-fitting Bunny Girl costume featuring glossy satin textures and sheer lace accents that highlight her slim waist and ample chest. She is lying back on a bright purple yoga mat, shot from a low angle to accentuate the length of her legs. With a playful and seductive expression, she pulls her sunglasses down slightly to gaze directly into the lens, her large expressive eyes catching the sharp ring light reflection. The background is a breathtaking, high-contrast view of the vast ocean and sky, rendered in desaturated muted tones with a soft bokeh effect. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination, flawless skin texture with visible pores.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
